title: Type mismatch on variable $boardId and argument board_id (Int! / ID!)
excerpt: I didn’t understand this error. It used to be normal, but now it says “Type mismatch on variable $boardId and argument board_id (Int!/ID!)”. I don’t understand that my boardId is already an integer

posts.author: allen-li123456 (Allen Li)
posts.cookedHtml:
I didn’t understand this error. It used to be normal, but now it says “Type mismatch on variable $boardId and argument board_id (Int!/ID!)”. I don’t understand that my boardId is already an integer

image3166×1466 346 KB

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
You are using variables. In API 2023-10 and later, board IDs changed from Int to type ID. Type ID is an integer or string, rather than just an integer - in conformance to GraphQL specifications.

GraphQL API

Migration guide - 2023-10

A guide to help developers migrate to monday API version 2023-10

See minor change #3

posts.author: allen-li123456 (Allen Li)
posts.cookedHtml: thank you，You’ve been bothering me for a long time
